import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; function Home() { const [clientData, setClientData] = useState(null); useEffect(() => { const loggedInUser = localStorage.getItem('clientUser'); if (loggedInUser) { setClientData(JSON.parse(loggedInUser)); } }, []); const handleLogout = () => { localStorage.removeItem('clientUser'); setClientData(null); window.location.reload(); }; return (
